results.title: OpenAI IPO 2026: $852B Valuation, Risks & Bull Case | TM
results.snippet: The OpenAI IPO is the most anticipated potential technology listing of the next IPO cycle. OpenAI closed a $122 billion round at an $852 billion post-money valuation on March 31, 2026 , one of the largest private financings ever announced by a technology company. The company is generating $2 billion in revenue per month against an estimated $14 billion in 2026 losses, with CFO Sarah Friar ...

results.title: OpenAI Raises $122B at $852B Valuation: What It Really Means
results.snippet: Quick Summary: On April 1 , 2026 , OpenAI confirmed the close of a $122 billion funding round — the largest private funding round in history by a factor of approximately four — valuing the company at $852 billion post-money. The round was co-led by SoftBank, with Amazon contributing $50 billion , Nvidia $30 billion , Andreessen Horowitz and D.E. Shaw also participating, and Microsoft ...

results.title: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI
results.snippet: OpenAI raises $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI Today, we closed our latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at a post money valuation of $852 billion . OpenAI is becoming the core infrastructure for AI, making it possible for people around the world and businesses, big and small, to just build things.

results.title: OpenAI Raises $122 Billion at $852 Billion Valuation
results.snippet: The OpenAI $122 billion funding round , officially announced in late March 2026 and confirmed in its final structure in early April , is anchored by three strategic infrastructure partners: Amazon at $50 billion , Nvidia at $30 billion , and SoftBank at $30 billion .

results.title: OpenAI valued at $852 billion after completing $122 billion round
results.snippet: OpenAI has completed a deal to raise $122 billion from investors at an $852 billion valuation , marking the company's largest funding round to date by far and bolstering its costly push for more chips, data centers and talent.

results.snippet: OpenAI announced it closed its record-breaking funding round at a post-money valuation of $852 billion . The round totaled $122 billion of committed capital, up from the $110 billion figure that ...
